rationale: zlib ships a mature CMakeLists.txt; wrapping it with rules_foreign_cc's cmake rule reliably builds libz with its own configure-time header generation, avoiding hand-modeling defines.
module_bazel:
module(
    name = "zlib",
    version = "1.3.2.1",
)

bazel_dep(name = "rules_foreign_cc", version = "0.15.1")
bazel_dep(name = "rules_cc", version = "0.2.19")
bazel_dep(name = "platforms", version = "1.1.0")
bazel_dep(name = "bazel_skylib", version = "1.9.0")
root_build:
load("@rules_foreign_cc//foreign_cc:defs.bzl", "cmake")

filegroup(
    name = "all_srcs",
    srcs = glob(
        ["**"],
        exclude = ["BUILD.bazel", "MODULE.bazel", "bazel-*/**"],
    ),
)

cmake(
    name = "zlib",
    lib_source = ":all_srcs",
    out_static_libs = ["libz.a"],
    cache_entries = {
        "BUILD_SHARED_LIBS": "OFF",
        "ZLIB_BUILD_EXAMPLES": "OFF",
    },
    visibility = ["//visibility:public"],
)
anticipated_risks: CMake toolchain discovery under hermetic Bazel
